en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Belgium Social Security documentation in the Belgium Social Security Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The Certificate of No Social Security Arrears can be obtained through the National Social Security Office (NSSO) online platform. It serves as an official certificate that confirms a company has no outstanding social security contributions.
Please upload your company’s valid Certificate of No Social Security Arrears, issued within the past 30 days by the NSSO, to confirm compliance with Belgium’s social security requirements.
